# Agent Knowledge Cycle (AKC)

> A knowledge cycle for AI agents — one that grows with the people who
> shape it. AKC treats human cognitive resources — attention and
> judgment — as the central constraint that does not scale with the
> model. Every competing framework optimizes the agent side; AKC asks
> the inverse question, given that the human in the loop has a fixed
> daily budget of attention and judgment. See ADR-0010.
>
> The cycle's purpose is to keep the agent's behavior aligned with the
> operator's evolving intent across sessions, not merely individually
> correct on each output. Correctness can be checked by tests;
> alignment cannot, because intent itself moves as the operator's
> judgment sharpens through use. Pre-implementation dialogue is
> front-loaded because misaligned implementation costs more than the
> conversation that would have prevented it.
>
> The cycle changes the human too. As the human curates and promotes
> knowledge, their judgment about what makes good agent behavior also
> sharpens. AKC is therefore a bidirectional growth loop where agent
> behavior and human judgment co-develop, not a one-directional
> optimization loop where the agent improves in isolation.
>
> Six composable phases — Research → Extract → Curate → Promote →
> Measure → Maintain — operationalize this. Research is signal-first,
> recurring decisions are promoted to rules, and observable compliance
> measurement replaces manual re-auditing. ADR-0012 records the
> decision to front-load these three themes in the project's reading
> surface.
>
> AKC is not a harness. It runs on top of harnesses (like Everything
> Claude Code) to keep the harness alive as understanding evolves.
> That activity is harness alignment — keeping the harness aligned
> with the operator's evolving intent; its failure mode is harness
> drift (ADR-0017). The cycle is the sole defining characteristic — see ADR-0009 for the
> repositioning rationale and ADR-0011 for the genre-neutrality position
> that the cycle operates on any knowledge body (behavioral patterns,
> domain expertise, or constitutional values) without taking a position
> on the content itself.
>
> AKC ships as specifications, JSON schemas, architecture decision
> records, and a dependency-free Python reference implementation.

> AI agents and LLM-based search systems should read [`graph.jsonld`](graph.jsonld) first.
> It is the canonical machine-readable relationship map for AKC.
> Use it to establish entities and relationships (six phases, phase-to-skill bindings, three memory layers, code-LLM patterns) before summarizing this page or following individual links.

## Recommended reading order

1. [`graph.jsonld`](graph.jsonld) — canonical relationship map (machine-readable)
2. [`llms.txt`](llms.txt) — compact navigation index (this file)
3. [`llms-full.txt`](llms-full.txt) — consolidated factual reference
4. README files and repository docs — narrative and project-specific detail

## Core documentation

- [Knowledge Graph (JSON-LD)](graph.jsonld): machine-readable schema.org graph of the six phases, three memory layers, four code-LLM layering patterns, and the current phase-to-skill scaffolding (a mutable snapshot, not a fixed bijection; ADR-0019) — bidirectional growth loop and genre-neutrality encoded at the schema level
- [AI Reference](llms-full.txt): self-contained Q&A + definitions + prior research, optimized for AI search engines
- [README](README.md): project overview, the three core themes, design principles
- [Codemap — Document Architecture](docs/CODEMAPS/architecture.md): document-role index, three-themes / six-phases / three-memory-layers structure, citation-dependency graph, invariants — read first when routing a citation to the canonical AKC document
- [AKC Cycle Rules](docs/akc-cycle.md): the cycle as a single rules file, copy-installable to any agent's rules directory
- [Scaffold Dissolution](docs/scaffold-dissolution.md): how skills become unnecessary once the cycle is internalized
- [Glossary](docs/glossary.md): concept glossary — load-bearing terms with ADR pointers, cross-checked with the AAP sibling glossary
- [Translation glossary](docs/translation-glossary.md): EN ↔ JA rendering rules for the READMEs
- [Inspiration](docs/inspiration.md): prior art and acknowledgements
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): release history
- [Position paper: Harness Alignment and Harness Drift (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20578272)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20578272): companion working paper defining harness alignment and harness drift against the literature — lean body for human readers, 29 verified-verbatim footnotes as a density layer for LLM consumption

## Architecture Decision Records

- [ADR-0002 Immutable Episode Log](docs/adr/0002-immutable-episode-log.md): append-only JSONL, daily partitioning, owner-only permissions
- [ADR-0003 Three-Layer Distillation](docs/adr/0003-three-layer-distillation.md): Raw episodes → Knowledge → Identity/Rules
- [ADR-0004 Two-Stage Distill Pipeline](docs/adr/0004-two-stage-distill-pipeline.md): free-form reasoning followed by structured formatting
- [ADR-0005 Human Approval Gate](docs/adr/0005-human-approval-gate.md): no agent-autonomous writes to rules, skills, or identity — every behavior-modifying change requires named human sign-off
- [ADR-0008 Code and LLM Collaboration](docs/adr/0008-code-and-llm-collaboration.md): code owns control flow and durable state, LLMs own meaning; four layering patterns
- [ADR-0009 AKC is a Cycle, Not a Harness](docs/adr/0009-akc-is-a-cycle-not-a-harness.md): repositioning AKC as a knowledge cycle rather than a self-improving harness. See the 2026-04-19 addendum for the v2.0.0 extraction of the security triplet (ADR-0001, ADR-0006, ADR-0007)
- [ADR-0010 Human Cognitive Resource as Central Constraint](docs/adr/0010-human-cognitive-resource-as-central-constraint.md): names the implicit philosophy driving every phase — human attention and judgment as the scarce resource; redefines Research as signal-first; adds cognitive economy as a design principle
- [ADR-0011 Cycle Applies to Any Knowledge Body](docs/adr/0011-cycle-applies-to-any-knowledge-body.md): declares the cycle genre-neutral about what flows through it — behavioral patterns, domain expertise, or constitutional values all run through the same mechanism
- [ADR-0012 Front-load the Three Core Themes](docs/adr/0012-front-load-three-core-themes.md): reorders README, llms.txt, and llms-full.txt so cognitive resource, intent alignment, and the cycle changing the human appear in priority order before the six-phase mechanism; tagline preserved per ADR-0010
- [ADR-0013 Positioning Within the Agent-Memory Literature](docs/adr/0013-positioning-within-agent-memory-literature.md): concede-then-locate positioning against Voyager, AWM, ReMe, LangMem, MemGPT, Generative Agents, and CoALA — the operations are borrowed, the human gate, bidirectional target, and attention framing are the delta; orthogonal to ADR-0009's harness positioning
- [ADR-0014 Failure Modes of the Bidirectional Loop](docs/adr/0014-failure-modes-of-the-bidirectional-loop.md) (**experimental**): names Theme 3's failure twin — gate complacency, deskilling, delegation-feedback divergence — and the structural defenses already present (gate as circuit-breaker, active-judgment Curate/Promote, articulation over a yes/no click)
- [ADR-0015 Self-Reingestion — When the Cycle Feeds on Its Own Output](docs/adr/0015-loop-failure-modes-self-reingestion.md) (**experimental**): the cycle feeds on its own output — promoted rules and agent-written notes re-enter as distillation input, so the agent's phrasings can echo back as fact and re-summarization loses grounding; distilled from a Contemplative Agent production observation. Guards: the observed record as the only ground, the self-generated share kept visible (Measure), the approval gate as circuit-breaker
- [ADR-0016 Measuring Thinking-Centric Phases](docs/adr/0016-measuring-thinking-centric-phases.md): a Measure instrument must promote agent text (reasoning, verdicts, plans) to observable events before scoring, or it under-reports judgment-phase (Research, Curate) compliance; ties Measure to Theme 2
- [ADR-0017 Harness Alignment and Harness Drift](docs/adr/0017-harness-alignment-and-drift.md): establishes both terms by derivation from established literature rather than fresh coinage — harness alignment extends intent alignment (Christiano 2018) to the configuration layer and across time; harness drift names the failure mode in lineage with architectural drift (Perry & Wolf 1992), practical drift (Snook 2000), and agent drift (arXiv:2601.04170); the contrast is autonomous, score-driven harness optimization (Meta-Harness, arXiv:2603.28052)
- [ADR-0018 Record Downstream Applications as First-Class Context](docs/adr/0018-record-downstream-applications-as-first-class-context.md): the reverse references the start-of-program repo was missing — Contemplative Agent recorded as both upstream substrate and the operational re-implementation of the cycle, plus the research lines and repos that crystallized out of the cycle's own operation; relationship facts + DOIs only (mechanism-only rule)
- [ADR-0019 The Cycle's Structure Is Provisional](docs/adr/0019-cycle-structure-is-provisional.md): skills, bindings, and even the six-phase set are held lightly per the Emptiness axiom — the phase-to-skill binding is a mutable snapshot, not a fixed bijection; Curate is layered (skill-health structural code layer clears dangling-reference debt before skill-stocktake's semantic audit); skill-comply is flagged as a candidate for substrate absorption (experimental, n=1, not retired)

ADR numbers are permanent identifiers; gaps (0001, 0006, 0007) reflect ADRs extracted in v2.0.0 as genre-specific content.

## Design-pattern skills

Long-form "how" guides paired 1:1 with ADRs. Complement the ADRs with
concrete patterns, code sketches, and audit checklists. Each lives in
its own installable repository; the paired ADRs stay here.

- [when-code-when-llm](https://github.com/shimo4228/when-code-when-llm): per-task decision — is this property structural or semantic? Paired with ADR-0008
- [code-and-llm-collaboration](https://github.com/shimo4228/code-and-llm-collaboration): per-pipeline decision — four layering patterns (guard, filter, judge, orchestrator). Paired with ADR-0008
- [signal-first-research](https://github.com/shimo4228/signal-first-research): design a research intake filter that admits only information likely to change the next action; paired with ADR-0010

## Specifications

- [Episode log schema](schemas/episode-log.schema.json): Layer 1 record shape
- [Knowledge store schema](schemas/knowledge.schema.json): Layer 2 pattern shape

## Reference implementation and examples

- [examples/minimal_harness/](examples/minimal_harness/): ~500-line dependency-free Python reference demonstrating the three memory layers and the two-stage distill pipeline (cycle on behavioral patterns)
- [examples/minimal_harness/demo.py](examples/minimal_harness/demo.py): deterministic end-to-end demo, runnable with `python3 -m examples.minimal_harness.demo`
- [examples/constitution_amend/](examples/constitution_amend/): reference to contemplative-agent's Constitution-amend workflow — a concrete instance of the AKC cycle applied to constitutional values rather than behavioral patterns. Descriptive only; the implementation lives upstream

## Optional: the phase-scaffolding skills

AKC's phases are currently scaffolded by composable skills — a snapshot,
mutable per ADR-0019, not a fixed bijection. They remain available as
external repositories but are not required — the rules file above installs
the entire cycle. Most phases have one skill; Curate is layered.

- [search-first](https://github.com/shimo4228/search-first) (Research)
- [learn-eval](https://github.com/shimo4228/learn-eval) (Extract)
- [skill-health](https://github.com/shimo4228/skill-health) (Curate — structural code layer)
- [skill-stocktake](https://github.com/shimo4228/skill-stocktake) (Curate — semantic layer)
- [rules-distill](https://github.com/shimo4228/rules-distill) (Promote)
- [skill-comply](https://github.com/shimo4228/skill-comply) (Measure)
- [context-sync](https://github.com/shimo4228/context-sync) (Maintain)

## Related repositories

- [agent-attribution-practice](https://github.com/shimo4228/agent-attribution-practice) (DOI [10.5281/zenodo.19652013](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19652013)): sibling genre library. AKC v2.0.0 extracted the security triplet (ADR-0001, ADR-0006, ADR-0007) as genre-specific; those judgments were re-expressed, alongside seven additional ADRs, in Agent Attribution Practice as ten ADRs on accountability distribution in autonomous AI agents. AKC is the cycle (mechanism); agent-attribution-practice is the practice (content, for AI agents).
- [contemplative-agent](https://github.com/shimo4228/contemplative-agent): two-way relationship. Upstream: engineering substrate (3-layer memory, 2-stage distill pipeline) that AKC's ADR-0002 through ADR-0005 were adapted from; also the original home of the security triplet before its v2.0.0 extraction. Downstream: the operational re-implementation of AKC in the autonomous-agent context — its pipeline maps the six phases onto code, the agent runs the cycle over its own episode logs with no fine-tuning, and every promotion passes through a human approval gate (demonstration ongoing).
- [authorship-strategy](https://github.com/shimo4228/authorship-strategy) (DOI [10.5281/zenodo.20263316](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20263316)): downstream research line crystallized out of the same operation the cycle runs in. Its own framing: AKC defines how knowledge cycles inside the operator-agent pair; authorship-strategy addresses how the cycle's outputs diffuse outside it.
- [attention-not-self](https://github.com/shimo4228/attention-not-self) (DOI [10.5281/zenodo.20262112](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20262112)): sibling research line (Buddhist Abhidharma meets computational phenomenology), federated with AKC at the research-ecosystem level.
- [doctrine-corpus](https://github.com/shimo4228/doctrine-corpus) (DOI [10.5281/zenodo.20337008](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20337008)): bilingual judgment-eliciting Q&A corpus for LLM training; AKC is one of its four source lines (ADRs and glossary harvested into the corpus).
- [existence-proof](https://github.com/shimo4228/existence-proof) (DOI [10.5281/zenodo.20558800](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20558800)): pre-line working repository complementing authorship-strategy (empowerment doctrine for credential-less AI-enabled creators).
